name: titon
description: Slash commands for working with Titon network protocols. Kronos automation (TSA-audited — zero findings; register jobs, run automatons, decode events, debug exit codes) and Fortuna threshold-BLS VRF (TSA-audited — zero findings; integrate consumers, monitor randomness, debug exit codes) on equal footing; ForgeTON pool ops surfaced through both. Skills ship in TypeScript + Python flavours — every TS recipe has a parallel `*-python` skill backed by titon-network-{kronos,fortuna}-sdk on PyPI. More protocols as they ship.
